text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Heh, thank you. Getting to spend another
birthday with you two is all I could ever ask for.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If you think about it, you're Brian's older sister,
but you're also the older sister out of the three of
us, too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! For the rest of the day, I'm gonna call
you "big sis"!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you like that? You do, don't you? Woohoo!
C'mon, you do it too, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Why nooot? You don't like "big sis"? What about
just "sis"? "Big sister"? "Dearest sister"?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I mean! First of all, why would
"big sis" be—
